---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
bibliography: references.bib
---

This repo contains misc explorations.

# ICA

See [here](ica.html)



# EBproj

## Analyses

- [Initial exploration of EBproj, with shifted Rademacher](shifted_rademacher_for_ebproj.html)
  - TODO: It seems we need to choose the correct rank. Investigate this.
